body:
Ever wanted to beat a zombie with a Bat? How about smacking a Creeper with a Rubber Chicken? Demolishing your friends with a Stop Sign?

We have just the mod for you!

Welcome to Goober Arsenal, the one stop shop for all your goofy mod needs.

This mod is full of items that will make you question your life choices.

From weapons, to armor, to food, to drops, everything was made to not make sense.

Download or add to your packs today and begin to meme-post.
